title: Presence Footsteps x Sable (Aeronautics Compat)
description: Presence Footsteps compatability for Sable / Create Aeronautics
body:
Simple patch to use Presence Footsteps sounds on Sable/Aeronautics contraptions.

Works with the following NeoForge forks on 1.21.1:

1Influence / Paintninja: [Presence Footsteps [Forge]](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps-forge)

ZCRAFT-NullPointerException: [Presence Footsteps (NeoForge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pf-neoforge)
